overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a post-industrial wasteland in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077 Badlands), featuring abandoned oil derricks, derelict buildings, and flooded terrain under a hazy sky. The camera moves steadily forward past chain-link fences and industrial debris, approaching and passing large concrete structures while navigating through increasingly waterlogged ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned industrial perimeter along chain-link fence

agents.ego_description: walking steadily forward along a fence line through dry wasteland terrain, observing the industrial ruins

entered.detail: tall metal security fence running parallel to the path on the left side
large rusted oil drilling tower with lattice structure against the hazy sky
rectangular concrete building with vertical blue stripe detailing on the facade
large black cylindrical pipe lying horizontally in the dry grass

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a desolate industrial wasteland with a chain-link fence running along the left and a modern industrial building on the right. The ground is dry with patches of dead grass and scattered debris. In the distance, tall oil derricks rise against a hazy sky as the camera moves steadily forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: open wasteland approaching central concrete structure

events.description: the industrial building on the right exits the frame, opening up to a wider view of the wasteland
ground transitions from dry dirt to increasingly waterlogged terrain with large puddles

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the open wasteland, navigating around puddles and debris while approaching a distant structure

entered.detail: large elevated rectangular building with blank facade and support pillars visible in the distance
metal overhead sign structure visible on the horizon beyond the building

segments.scene_description: Having passed the perimeter building, the scene opens into a wide wasteland with scattered puddles replacing the dry ground. The camera approaches a large elevated concrete structure in the center distance while oil derricks remain visible on the left horizon. The terrain becomes progressively wetter as the camera advances.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded industrial zone beneath highway overpass

events.description: camera passes the large concrete structure on the right side, revealing more of the flooded terrain ahead

agents.ego_description: wading through ankle-deep water while passing the large concrete structure, heading toward distant highway infrastructure

entered.detail: leafless dead tree trunk emerging from the flood water

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through deeply flooded terrain with large reflective pools of water covering the ground. The camera passes the large concrete building on the right and continues toward a highway sign gantry in the distance. Oil derricks remain visible on the left while dead vegetation and debris float in the murky water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a desolate industrial wasteland that gradually transforms from dry, debris-strewn land into a deeply flooded basin. It begins beside a chain-link fence and a modern industrial building, moving across dry ground with patches of dead grass toward distant oil derricks under a hazy sky. As the camera passes the perimeter building, the scene opens into a wider expanse where the dry terrain gives way to scattered puddles and a large elevated concrete structure emerges in the distance. The environment then shifts into a waterlogged landscape as the camera navigates through large reflective pools of murky water, passing the concrete building on the right. Finally, the movement continues past floating debris and dead vegetation toward a highway sign gantry, with the oil derricks remaining as distant silhouettes on the horizon.
